'''nashotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mho|mho]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-sh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mho|mho]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nashotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næshetheth|næshetheth]] || [[word:næshethej|næshethej]] || [[word:næshethesh|næshethesh]] || [[word:næshethe|næshethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nashoshothoth|nashoshothoth]] || [[word:nashoshothoj|nashoshothoj]] || [[word:nashoshothosh|nashoshothosh]] || [[word:nashoshotho|nashoshotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nashothoth|nashothoth]] || [[word:nashothoj|nashothoj]] || [[word:nashothosh|nashothosh]] || [[word:nashotho|nashotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nashofthoth|nashofthoth]] || [[word:nashofthoj|nashofthoj]] || [[word:nashofthosh|nashofthosh]] || [[word:nashofthof|nashofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nashothotho|nashothotho]] || [[word:nashothojo|nashothojo]] || [[word:nashothosho|nashothosho]] || [[word:nashothoko|nashothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nashothoth|nashothoth]] || [[word:nashothoj|nashothoj]] || [[word:nashothosh|nashothosh]] || [[word:nashotho|nashotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nashothothol|nashothothol]] || [[word:nashothojol|nashothojol]] || [[word:nashothoshol|nashothoshol]] || [[word:nashothokol|nashothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nashothothotho|nashothothotho]] || [[word:nashothojojo|nashothojojo]] || [[word:nashothoshosho|nashothoshosho]] || [[word:nashothoko|nashothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nashothothon|nashothothon]] || [[word:nashothojon|nashothojon]] || [[word:nashothoshon|nashothoshon]] || [[word:nashothokon|nashothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nashothothoro|nashothothoro]] || [[word:nashothojoro|nashothojoro]] || [[word:nashothoshoro|nashothoshoro]] || [[word:nashothokoro|nashothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
